about.heading: About Me
about.title: I'm Krishna GSVV — developer, researcher & hackathon champion
paragraphs: I'm a software engineer and AI researcher who builds at the intersection of technology and real-world impact. What started as curiosity about how computers work has grown into published research, hackathon wins, and a growing library of open-source tools that people actually use.

I specialize in full-stack development with React and Python, and I dive deep into AI whenever I get the chance. Right now I'm building EquiLens — a platform to detect bias in language models — alongside computer vision apps and blockchain tools like HiveXplore. Whether it's a VS Code extension or an ML pipeline, I care about code that's clean, fast, and worth using.

I also contribute actively to AI research — my work on diabetic retinopathy prediction using deep learning is published on IEEE, and the EquiLens corpus dataset is released on Zenodo. On the competition front, I've won ₹3.75L+ across hackathons at IIT Delhi, IIT Hyderabad, Tredence Inc., and Microsoft.

I believe technology should be accessible and transparent. My open-source portfolio — 25+ projects including VS Code extensions with 2K+ downloads — reflects that belief. Always building, always learning, always looking for the next interesting problem.

image.note: Set type to 'github' to use GitHub profile image, 'home' to use same as home page, or 'custom' to use customUrl

about.note: Configure the About page content - heading, subheading, title, paragraphs, image settings, skills section heading, and skills categories with items

staticProjects.name: Krishna GSVV Portfolio
staticProjects.description: A modern, responsive portfolio website built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. Features dynamic GitHub repository fetching, beautiful animations, and a comprehensive configuration system that makes it fully customizable through a single JSON file.
highlights: Fully responsive design with mobile-first approach
Dynamic GitHub repository integration with real-time fetching
Comprehensive configuration system - no code changes needed
Beautiful animations powered by Framer Motion
JSON Schema support for IntelliSense in VS Code

staticProjects.name: RanobeGemini
staticProjects.description: Browser extension enhancing web novel translations using Google's Gemini AI. Transforms poorly translated content on popular novel sites with one click.
highlights: AI-powered translation enhancement using Google Gemini
One-click transformation of poorly translated content
Supports popular web novel reading sites

staticProjects.name: Youtube-Keystrokes-Blocker
staticProjects.description: A powerful userscript that gives you fine-grained control over YouTube keyboard shortcuts. Block distracting hotkeys while keeping the ones you need active.
highlights: Fine-grained control over YouTube keyboard shortcuts
Block specific hotkeys while keeping others active

staticProjects.name: ToxicGuard_AI
staticProjects.description: ToxiGuard AI is a browser extension that detects and censors toxic language in real-time using TensorFlow.js. It offers fine-grained controls, visual feedback, auto-censor, adjustable sensitivity, and respects user privacy.

staticProjects.name: EquiLens
staticProjects.description: AI Bias Detection Platform for LLMs via Ollama. Interactive CLI with corpus generation, multi-metric auditing, statistical analysis & visualization. Features enhanced auditors, dynamic concurrency, resume capability & rich progress tracking.
highlights: Interactive CLI with rich progress tracking
Supports multiple LLM providers via Ollama

staticProjects.name: Save-Sync
staticProjects.description: VS Code Extension to save your project at working save points.
highlights: Save project state at meaningful working checkpoints
Restore workspace to any previous save point
Timeline view of project save history
Integrates seamlessly with VS Code workflow

staticProjects.name: Eldritchify
staticProjects.description: Eldritchify is a cosmic horror-themed Zalgo text generator that corrupts and purifies text using Unicode combining characters. Invoke the whispers of Azathoth, channel the chaos of Nyarlathotep, or cleanse your text from the madness with this Lovecraftian-inspired web tool!
highlights: Unicode combining characters for text effects
Multiple intensity levels from whisper to pure chaos
Reverse purification to clean corrupted text

staticProjects.name: CFlair-Counter
staticProjects.description: Ultra-efficient serverless view counter with admin panel and SVG badges. Optimized for Cloudflare's free tier with headless telemetry tracking.
highlights: SVG badge generation for project stats
Headless telemetry with zero performance cost

staticProjects.name: the-pensive-index
staticProjects.description: Library-first fanfiction discovery platform with hierarchical tagging and intelligent prompt generation. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Spec-Driven Development.
highlights: Hierarchical tagging system for story discovery
Intelligent prompt generation for content curation

staticProjects.name: eVidya
staticProjects.description: eVidya: Interactive tech learning platform with progress tracking, video lessons, quizzes, and responsive design for self-paced education in programming languages and web development.
highlights: Interactive tech learning with video lessons and quizzes
Responsive design for all device sizes
Covers programming languages and web development

staticProjects.name: cspell-sync
staticProjects.description: cspell-sync: VS Code extension syncing project spelling dictionaries with global settings for consistent spell checking across workspaces.
highlights: Keyboard shortcuts and status bar integration
Supports custom dictionaries and project settings

staticProjects.name: Relax
staticProjects.description: Refresh with inspirational quotes, GIFs and memes.
highlights: GIF and meme integration for mood boost

staticProjects.name: DrDerma
staticProjects.description: Dermatology diagnosis and skin condition assessment tool using machine learning.

staticProjects.name: Facial-Emotion-Detector
staticProjects.description: Facial emotion detection using MediaPipe and machine learning. Extract facial landmarks, train models, and classify emotions in real-time from images and videos.
highlights: Real-time emotion classification from images and video
Award-winning project at Tredence InfinityAI Hackathon

staticProjects.name: ActionsCounter
staticProjects.description: GitHub Actions workflow tracker and analytics dashboard for CI/CD monitoring, deployment tracking, and webhook integration.
highlights: GitHub Actions workflow analytics and tracking

staticProjects.name: SignLanguageDetector
staticProjects.description: Sign Language Detector is a real-time ISL recognition system. It uses OpenCV and MediaPipe for hand tracking, a machine learning classifier for gesture recognition, and a Flask web interface for live inference.
highlights: Real-time Indian Sign Language recognition system
Interactive Flask web interface for live inference
MediaPipe hand tracking for precise detection

staticProjects.name: ParkMeter
staticProjects.description: Parking Ticket Management System for tracking and managing parking tickets, including payment processing, ticket history, and notifications.

staticProjects.name: CounterAPI
staticProjects.description: A self-hostable, free-forever ping counter with FastAPI and Postgres. Deploy to Render and track project usage via simple API pings.
highlights: One-click deploy to Render free tier

staticProjects.name: BreachCheck
staticProjects.description: BreachCheck is a tool designed to help users check if their email addresses or passwords have been involved in known data breaches. It leverages APIs from various breach database aggregators to provide users with information about their potential exposure.
highlights: Check emails and passwords against known breach databases

staticProjects.name: HiveXplore
staticProjects.description: HiveXplore is a beginner-friendly app built on Hive blockchain that introduces newcomers to decentralized social media without technical barriers. Features simplified authentication, intuitive posting tools, and guided experiences as an educational gateway for blockchain beginners.
highlights: Won 1st Runner-up at IIT Delhi CodeHive Hackathon (₹1L prize)
Simplified Hive blockchain authentication (Keychain, HiveSigner, HiveAuth)
Real-time decentralized content creation and interaction

staticProjects.name: zipCracker
staticProjects.description: A Python-based tool for recovering passwords from protected ZIP, RAR, 7Z, and TAR archives using dictionary attacks, brute force methods, and concurrent processing.
highlights: Multi-format support: ZIP, RAR, 7Z, and TAR archives
Dictionary attack and brute force recovery methods

publications.title: Predicting Severity of Type 2 Diabetic Retinopathy Using Retinal Fundus Images with New Deep Learning Architectures from the Inception and ResNet Families
publications.description: Due to its high morbidity and medical expenses, DR mellitus (T2DM) is a serious global health concern. Its burden can be lessened with effective early prognosis, but the available treatments are not enough. Predictive modelling of Retina Images (fundus) can enhance early diagnosis and care quality. Advanced convolutional neural networks (Inception-V4, ResNet V1, and ResNet V2) are used in this study to assess the severity of Diabetic Retinopathy caused by T2DM. Using de-identified fundus data from 9,948 individuals (1,904 with a T2DM diagnosed), we used transfer learning to train these models. We have performed simple data augmentation to rectify the class imbalance. The accuracy and AUC of the ensemble model were 94.21% and 98.53%, respectively. The findings imply that the combination of ResNet and Inception-V4 enhances classification power, providing a viable approach for early T2DM identification from fundus data that may find use in clinical settings. Future research still needs to focus on improving sensitivity and integrating real-time.

publications.title: EquiLens CorpusGen v1.0.0 — Gender Bias Audit Corpus
publications.description: The EquiLens Corpus Generator is an open-source tool for creating balanced, reproducible datasets for bias auditing in Small Language Models (SLMs).

description: Serve as the elected class advisor for the B.Tech CS batch, acting as the primary liaison between students and faculty.
Coordinate academic schedules and extracurricular activities, address student concerns, and help maintain a healthy, collaborative class environment.
Participate in robotics challenges and workshops, contributing to hardware-software integration projects.
Collaborate with team members to design and prototype autonomous systems combining sensors, actuators, and custom control logic.
Engage in ACM-organized technical talks, coding events, and competitive programming sessions.
Collaborate on inter-chapter hackathons and stay current with emerging CS research through the ACM Digital Library.
Maintain 25+ open-source repositories under the Life-Experimentalist GitHub organization, including tools with active community usage.
Review pull requests, triage issues, write documentation, and mentor contributors on projects ranging from VS Code extensions to AI research tooling.

resume.volunteerExperienceNote: Configure volunteer experience - each should have role, organization, period, and description array

personalProjects.name: EquiLens
personalProjects.description: Built open-source CLI to audit statistical bias in LLM outputs; published EquiLens Corpus v1.0.0 on Zenodo for reproducible bias research. Automated corpus generation with controlled variable isolation and dynamic concurrency to output concrete fairness metrics across demographic axes.

personalProjects.name: HiveXplore
personalProjects.description: 1st Runner-up at IIT Delhi CodeHive Hackathon (INR 1,00,000) with a beginner-friendly Hive blockchain onboarding app built in 24 hours. Implemented Keychain, HiveSigner, and HiveAuth flows with guided demo mode and Flask + SQLite caching for low-latency responses.

personalProjects.name: Indian Sign Language Detector
personalProjects.description: Award-winning at Tredence InfinityAI 2025 (INR 2,00,000 prize pool) with real-time ISL recognition achieving 98% classification accuracy. Built full ML pipeline from MediaPipe landmark extraction to custom classifier training and live Flask inference with sub-100ms latency.

personalProjects.name: RanobeGemini
personalProjects.description: Cross-browser extension (Chrome, Edge, Firefox) enhancing machine-translated web novels with Gemini AI and an extensible site-adapter architecture for rapid platform support.

social.note: Configure all social media platforms here. Set enabled: true and provide URL to activate. Use showInHome, showInFooter, showInContact to control where each platform appears. To add new platforms, add a new object with name, key, icon, url, label, color, hoverColor, and show flags. Available icons: FaGithub, FaLinkedin, FaTwitter, FaInstagram, FaDiscord, FaYoutube, FaTwitch, FaTiktok, FaMedium, FaDev, FaStackOverflow, FaDribbble, FaBehance, FaCodepen, ArrowUpIcon, Bars3Icon, XMarkIcon

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Whether it's a hackathon, a startup idea, or an interesting open-source project — I'm always up for a conversation. Let's build something worth showing off.

status.message: Available for new opportunities and collaborations

currentFocus.title: What I'm Working On
currentFocus.description: Building AI-powered web applications, contributing to open source projects, and exploring new technologies in web development and machine learning.

faq.question: What's your typical response time?
faq.answer: I usually respond to emails and messages within 24 hours during weekdays. If it's a weekend or holiday, it might take a bit longer.

faq.question: What types of projects do you work on?
faq.answer: I specialize in full-stack web development, AI integration, and modern React applications. I'm open to both short-term consulting and longer-term collaborations.

faq.question: Are you available for freelance work?
faq.answer: Yes! I'm always interested in discussing interesting projects. Feel free to reach out with your project details and timeline.

faq.question: Do you mentor or teach?
faq.answer: Absolutely! I enjoy helping others learn programming and web development. I'm available for mentoring sessions and code reviews.

contact.note: Configure the Contact Page layout, sections, and content. The Contact Page supports a flexible two-column layout with configurable sections. You can rearrange sections, change titles, add/remove sections, and control what content appears where. Available section types: 'contactInfo' (email, phone, location), 'currentFocus' (what you're working on), 'quickActions' (action buttons with icons), 'github' (GitHub profiles), 'social' (social media platforms), 'collaboration' (collaboration interests). Each section can be shown/hidden and have custom titles. The 'github' and 'social' sections automatically pull from the configured platforms and will display in a grid layout. Platforms with descriptions will be displayed horizontally with text, while simple platforms will show as icon-only cards. Social platforms can be filtered to show only on Contact Page by setting showInContact: true and other show flags to false.
